title: NATO allies question US leadership — Iran war fallout may end US-led alliance; Germany prepares 460K-troop defense plan
snippet: NPR analysis: Trump's decision to leave NATO in the dark before striking Iran, followed by demands for alliance support in Hormuz, has pushed European leaders to consider a future where the US no longer leads NATO. Germany's Pistorius unveiled a 460,000-troop defense plan. Pentagon announced withdrawal of 5,000 US service members from Germany (~14% of 36,000 stationed).
tag_reason: NATO 리더십 구조 변화 분석은 이전 독일 철수(src-675) 후속이나 '미국 리더십 종료' 프레임은 신규.
